_meta.purpose: Region-pack registry. Palimpsest's method (deletion-as-data, DDTI selectivity/novelty, the Fear Index) is country-agnostic; each authoritarian information space is a CONFIG PACK, not a rewrite. Adding a country = a lexicon + a few public sources.
_meta.schema: regions.<code> = { name, lang, term_key, gazetteer, sources[], note }

cn.name: China
cn.note: 154-term evidence-grounded lexicon. Human-authored; never delegated to a PRC-aligned model.

ir.name: Iran
ir.note: Starter lexicon, Woman-Life-Freedom era (2022- ). Proves the abstraction; community-extendable.
